task_name: Add Phase Scanner CLI Error Tests
goal: Add process-level Phase Scanner CLI error tests without changing scanner runtime behavior or enabling external system access.
claims: BP-028 adds CLI error tests for missing input path, missing file, and invalid JSON.
The tests prove Phase Scanner CLI failures exit non-zero and print usage or read failure guidance.
No Phase Scanner runtime, docs, fixtures, live Builder, auth, secret, DB, deploy, or write behavior is introduced.
assumptions: Existing Phase Scanner CLI error behavior is acceptable and only needs test coverage.
Temporary invalid JSON can be created inside the test process without committed invalid fixtures.
The shared review suite is the right verification entrypoint.
dod: The test covers missing input, missing file, and invalid JSON.
The shared review suite runs the new CLI error test.
stop_conditions: Live Builder, auth, secrets, DB, deploy, or external system behavior becomes necessary
prior_task_findings: BP-027 added deterministic Phase Scanner fixtures and wired them into the shared review suite.
